title: GTM Engineer, Sales
description:
Aven is hiring a GTM Engineer to architect and scale our partnerships channel. You’ll spend your time in the field solving complex adoption blockers for external partners, then build the workflows, automations, internal tooling, and AI\-enabled systems that make the entire motion automated and scalable.


We’re looking for a rare hybrid: someone with the technical depth of a strong engineer and the urgency and horsepower of an entrepreneur. You should be equally comfortable commanding a room in a consultative sales process and diving into code to automate the motion you just ran. If you’re obsessed with replacing manual toil with elegant machinery—and excited about applying AI to scale GTM — this role is for you.

**What you’ll do**

* Be the technical lead driving adoption and operational wins across our entire partnership ecosystem
* Build and maintain workflows, automations, internal tools, and AI\-assisted systems that improve the scalability and reliability of Aven’s GTM engine
* Diagnose and fix messy cross\-system issues across APIs, data pipelines, automation logic, and third\-party tools when things break or behave unexpectedly
* Build dashboards, alerts, and operational tooling that help internal teams and partners monitor performance and respond quickly
* Implement AI\-assisted outbound campaigns that use account research, data enrichment, and personalized sequences to turn cold leads into closed deals
* Identify recurring bottlenecks, failure points, and manual work across the partner funnel, then replace them with durable, system\-level solutions
* Create the documentation, enablement materials, and executive\-facing decks that make Aven’s value proposition clear, compelling, and easy to adopt

**Who you are**

* 3\+ years in a technical or operational engineering role, such as Solutions Engineer, Forward Deployed Engineer, Technical RevOps, or a similar role
* Strong software engineering fundamentals, including data structures, debugging, testing, and writing clean, maintainable code
* Proficient in SQL and at least one general\-purpose programming language, and comfortable working with APIs, webhooks, databases, and event\-driven workflows.
* Experience building production\-quality software, internal tools, automations, or integrations through work, internships, or substantial personal projects
* High\-agency operator who can move from zero to one quickly, figure things out in ambiguous environments, and build leverage through systems rather than manual effort
* Strong persuasive skills when representing Aven confidently in partner conversations
* Experienced with CRM and automation tools such as Salesforce, HubSpot, Clay, Zapier, n8n, Apollo, or similar platforms
* Bonus: Experience with SEO/GEO, lead nurture systems, website conversion, or growth experimentation

title: Sr. Manager, GTM Systems Engineering
description:
Overview:

This position is hybrid in Peachtree Corners, Georgia and sits within our Product Development division, which develops, tests, and improves our software solutions in an innovative and collaborative environment. **The Opportunity**


At ConstructConnect, the Data \& Analytics organization leads a multidisciplinary team—software engineers, data engineers, analytics engineers, and GTM systems engineers/admins—that owns the full data lifecycle from acquisition through activation. This team powers our products, insights, and go\-to\-market motion with reliable, actionable data.


We are seeking a Sr. Manager, GTM Systems Engineering who combines deep technical expertise in GTM platforms (Salesforce, HubSpot, Zuora, Planhat) with the leadership maturity to run GTM Systems as a strategic, AI\-first business function. This leader will own the GTM systems roadmap, tightly align it with revenue and customer experience outcomes, and build a high\-performing team that earns stakeholder trust through business acumen, delivery discipline, and measurable impact.


The right person leads from the front on strategy and AI\-first architecture, but empowers their team to execute. They are fluent in the language of the business—sales motions, customer success workflows, marketing funnels, and financial operations—and translate that understanding into AI\-enabled GTM systems and workflows that accelerate growth.

  


Responsibilities:
**What You’ll Be Doing**

* Champion AI\-first GTM systems by integrating AI agents (e.g., Glean) into Salesforce and adjacent workflows, turning pilots into production solutions that deliver measurable time savings and productivity gains.
* Own and communicate the GTM systems roadmap, tightly aligned to company OKRs, quarterly priorities, and the GTM Technology Steering Committee.
* Set the long\-term GTM systems vision and make impact\-based prioritization decisions, including saying no to low\-value work.
* Partner with Revenue, Product, Finance, and Engineering leaders to ensure GTM systems investments are tied to strategy and measurable ROI.
* Translate business goals into system requirements, implementation plans, and clear success metrics.
* Lead, develop, and hold accountable a high\-performing GTM systems team (admins, delivery manager, analysts) with clear expectations and timely feedback.
* Address performance issues early and directly, using structured performance management where needed.
* Delegate execution while focusing your time on coaching, mentoring, and removing blockers.
* Build bench strength and career paths, including certifications and development plans for future technical leaders.
* Act as a trusted partner to GTM and Finance teams, understanding their workflows, pain points, and metrics.
* Run predictable, high\-quality delivery using Agile/Kanban and core engineering KPIs (cycle time, throughput, quality) to drive continuous improvement.
* Ensure strong SDLC practices (sandboxing, testing, CI/CD, release management) and maintain clear documentation of configurations, integrations, and architecture.
* Define and own a metrics framework that connects GTM systems work to outcomes (revenue operations efficiency, stakeholder satisfaction, uptime, automation savings).
* Regularly report data\-driven impact (e.g., sales velocity, retention, onboarding efficiency, cost reduction) and use stakeholder feedback to refine priorities.
* Oversee implementation, integration, performance, and governance of GTM systems (Salesforce, HubSpot, Planhat, Zuora), including access, data integrity, security, and debt reduction.
* This job description in no way implies that the duties listed here are the only ones that team members can be required to perform.

  


Qualifications:

**What You Bring to the Team**

* Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Business, or related field (or equivalent experience).
* 7\+ years of experience in GTM systems administration and architecture, with hands\-on depth in Salesforce and at least one of HubSpot, Zuora, Gainsight, or Planhat.
* 5\+ years of people leadership experience, including managing teams of 5\+ technical professionals.
* Demonstrated track record of strategic leadership—setting vision, building roadmaps, and making prioritization tradeoffs aligned with business goals.
* Proven ability to develop and manage team performance—including setting expectations, delivering feedback, conducting performance reviews, and managing underperformance with professionalism and urgency.
* Strong business acumen—you understand sales motions, customer success workflows, marketing funnels, and revenue operations deeply enough to anticipate stakeholder needs and design solutions without extensive hand\-holding.
* Excellent executive communication skills—clear, concise, and confident in steering committees, business reviews, and cross\-functional forums.
* Data\-driven mindset—you define success metrics, track them, and use them to tell the story of your team's impact.
* Experience working within Agile/Kanban frameworks and product operating model.
* Strong project management skills with experience managing multiple concurrent initiatives.

**Physical Demands and Work Environment**

* The physical activities of this position include frequent sitting, telephone communication, and working on a computer for extended periods. Visual acuity is required to perform activities close to the eyes.
* Team members are expected to maintain a dedicated and ergonomically appropriate remote workspace.
* Team members who live within commuting distance of one of our office locations (Greater Cincinnati/Northern Kentucky or Atlanta, Georgia) are expected to work in a hybrid capacity, with regular in\-office presence as determined by the team or department.
* All team members must reside and perform their work within the United States.

**E\-Verify Statement**  

ConstructConnect utilizes the E\-Verify program with every potential new hire. This makes it possible for us to make certain that every employee who works for ConstructConnect is eligible to work in the United States. To learn more about E\-Verify you can call 1\-800\-255\-7688 or visit their website. E\-Verify® is a registered trademark of the United States Department of Homeland Security.
 Privacy Notice

title: GTM Engineer, Growth Programs
description:
Marketing · Full\-time · San Francisco, New York

  

Our mission is to automate coding. The first step in our journey is to build the best tool for professional programmers, using a combination of inventive research, design, and engineering. Our organization is very flat, and our team is small and talent dense. We particularly like people who are truth\-seeking, passionate, and creative. We enjoy spirited debate, crazy ideas, and shipping code.

### **What you’ll do**

* Architect and build program infrastructure that powers current and future growth programs (Startups, developer ecosystem, partnerships).
* Streamline and automate end\-to\-end GTM workflows so teams can move faster with less operational overhead.
* Design systems that are scalable, durable, and easy to extend as we add new segments, geos, and program types.
* Partner closely with Marketing, Growth, Data, and Engineering to scope and ship high\-leverage improvements.
* Integrate tools and APIs (AI APIs, MCP servers, internal services, and best\-in\-class automation platforms) to build agents and workflows that remove friction.
* Own the “plumbing” that connects systems: data flows, audience/segment logic, lead \+ routing logic, permissions, and reliability.
* Establish measurement and feedback loops so programs can be evaluated, iterated, and scaled.
* Create and maintain lightweight documentation, runbooks, and training so the team stays self\-sufficient.

### **What success looks like**

* Programs launch faster and with fewer manual steps.
* Segmentation, eligibility, routing, and reporting are reliable and auditable.
* The growth tech stack is simpler over time, with fewer redundant tools and clearer ownership.
* AI\-assisted workflows deliver measurable gains in productivity, quality, and cost.

### **You may be a fit if**

* You’ve built automation, tooling, or systems that helped a GTM team scale (marketing ops, growth ops, GTM engineering).
* You are a systems thinker and builder who turns messy problems into simple, repeatable systems.
* You have strong technical background and can collaborate effectively with engineers while also serving non\-technical stakeholders.
* You can design primitives that generalize across programs (audiences, eligibility rules, workflows, approvals, SLAs).
* You communicate clearly through crisp writing, dashboards, and decision making.

### **Experience that helps**

* 5\+ years in Marketing Operations, Growth Operations/Automation, GTM Engineering, or a similar role in a high\-growth SaaS environment.
* Experience with AI\-powered automation and orchestration tools (e.g. Clay, Zapier, Unify, Hightouch) and a comfort level working with APIs.
* Practical experience applying AI to real workflows (LLMs, prompt engineering, RAG), with an emphasis on reliability and safety.
* Proficiency with SQL and/or modern BI tools (e.g., Looker, Tableau, Power BI, Omni).
* Experience supporting lead funnel management: lead processing, routing logic, SLAs, and scoring/qualification frameworks.
* Deep familiarity with the latest AI\-powered GTM tool stacks and workflows.

### **Nice to have**

* Experience supporting programs for technical audiences.
* Experience with fraud mitigation, quality controls, and operational risk management in program ops.
* Experience owning a larger marketing tooling suite (vendor evaluation, administration, access management, tooling roadmap).

title: Crystal Growth Engineer
description:
In this role, you will work closely with experienced engineers and technicians to operate crystal growth equipment, analyze process data, improve process performance, and support the transfer of new technologies from research and development into manufacturing.


This position offers a hands\-on opportunity to work with high\-temperature crystal growth systems while developing expertise in process control, equipment operation, and manufacturing improvement within a collaborative environment.


Responsibilities:


Support the execution and continuous improvement of existing crystal growth processes while working closely with technicians and operations staff.
  

* Participate in the development of scaled\-up processes while working closely with engineering leads.
* Assist with the construction, operation, and troubleshooting of high\-temperature crystal growth equipment.
* Perform data analysis to support Lean manufacturing initiatives, including updating work instructions and identifying opportunities for process improvement.
* Participate in the transfer of new crystal growth processes from R\&D into production.
* Apply statistical process control (SPC) tools to monitor and improve manufacturing processes.
* Develop a working knowledge of material quality metrics to support routine production troubleshooting, including failure analysis, root cause determination, and implementation of corrective actions.
* Identify and track process deviations to understand their impact on yield, reliability, and product quality.
**Qualifications**

* Bachelor’s degree in Materials Science, Physics, Chemistry, Chemical Engineering, or a related scientific or engineering discipline with
* 2 years professional experience or accredited college internships with direclty related expereince in crystal growth
  

	+ Hands\-on experience with bulk crystal growth processes.
	+ Experience operating or troubleshooting high\-temperature processing equipment.
	+ Familiarity with raw material batching and preparation for crystal growth processes.
	+ Ability to work independently as well as collaboratively in a team environment.
	+ Strong analytical and problem\-solving skills.
	+ Excellent written and verbal communication skills.
	+ High attention to detail.

**Safety Requirements**

All employees are required to follow the site EHS procedures and Coherent Corp. Corporate EHS standards.


**Quality and Environmental Responsibilities**

Depending on location, this position may be responsible for the execution and maintenance of the ISO 9000, 9001, 14001 and/or other applicable standards that may apply to the relevant roles and responsibilities within the Quality Management System and Environmental Management System.


**Culture Commitment**

Ensure adherence to company’s values (ICARE) in all aspects of your position at Coherent Corp.:


**I** ntegrity – Create an Environment of Trust


**C** ollaboration – Innovate Through the Sharing of Ideas


**A** ccountability – Own the Process and the Outcome


**R** espect – Recognize the Value in Everyone


**E** nthusiasm – Find a Sense of Purpose in Work  



  

*Coherent Corp. is an equal opportunity/affirmative action employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to sex, gender identity, sexual orientation, race, color, religion, national origin, disability, protected Veteran status, age, or any other characteristic protected by law.*

  

*If you need assistance or an accommodation due to a disability, you may contact us at* *talentacquisition@coherent.com* *.*


  
ABOUT US
  
Coherent is a global leader in lasers, engineered materials and networking components. We are a vertically integrated manufacturing company that develops innovative products for diversified applications in the industrial, optical communications, military, life sciences, semiconductor equipment, and consumer markets. Coherent provides a comprehensive career development platform within an environment that challenges employees to perform at their best, while rewarding excellence and hard\-work through a competitive compensation program. It's an exciting opportunity to work for a company that offers stability, longevity and growth. Come Join Us!
  

  

**Note to recruiters and employment agencies:** We will not pay for unsolicited resumes from recruiters and employment agencies unless we have a signed agreement and have required assistance, in writing, for a specific opening.

title: Clay Consultant - GTM Engineer (Contract)
description:
AppsFlyer helps brands make good choices for their business and their customers with its advanced measurement, data analytics, deep linking, engagement, fraud protection, data clean room, and privacy\-preserving technologies. Built on the idea that brands can increase customer privacy while providing exceptional experiences, AppsFlyer empowers thousands of creators and 10,000\+ technology partners to create better, more meaningful customer relationships.



We are seeking a Clay Consultant \- GTM Engineer to redesign and build our AI\-powered pipeline and SDR infrastructure. This is a 6\-month contract (monthly retainer) focused on replacing manual workflows with automated, scalable systems and enabling RevOps ownership.



This is a hands\-on builder role you will spend the majority of your time executing within tools and systems, not creating strategy decks.


**What you'll do:**


**1\. Design the SDR Operating System**


* Define the end\-to\-end SDR workflow (targeting qualification outreach handoff)
* Partner with SDR leadership to ensure alignment with real rep workflows
* Establish a scalable foundation for automation
  


**2\. Build Automated Pipeline Infrastructure**


* Develop a Clay\-powered target identification engine to source and prioritize hit list accounts daily
* Implement automated account enrichment
* Ensure seamless Salesforce integration (read/write, deduplication, hygiene)
  


**3\. Enable AI\-Driven Outreach**


* Build sequence infrastructure and messaging frameworks
* Implement AI\-powered personalization at scale using Clay \+ LLMs
* Automate triggering of sequences based on enriched signals
  


**4\. Optimize \& Iterate**


* Measure workflow performance and pipeline impact
* Run experiments and continuously improve system outputs
* Treat the system as a product with a backlog
  


**5\. Document \& Handoff**


* Fully document workflows, data sources, and logic
* Train RevOps to own and maintain the system
* Ensure long\-term sustainability beyond the engagement


**What you have:**


* Proven experience building Clay workflows (portfolio required)
* Experience with data sourcing tools (Apollo, ZoomInfo, or similar)
* Strong working knowledge of Salesforce as a data layer
* Hands\-on experience with automation platforms (Make, n8n, Zapier)
* Experience supporting enterprise SDR/BDR teams
* Deep understanding of SDR workflows at the rep level
* Ability to document systems and enable handoff to internal teams
* Background in adtech, martech, or SaaS GTM environments
* Experience working with LLM APIs for enrichment or scoring
* Experience supporting enterprise / "whale hunting" sales motions
* Familiarity with data hygiene, deduplication, and scaling Salesforce data quality


As a global company operating from 25 offices across 19 countries, we reflect the human mosaic of the diverse and multicultural world in which we live. We ensure equal opportunities for all of our employees and promote the recruitment of diverse talents to our global teams without consideration of race, gender, culture, or sexual orientation. We value and encourage curiosity, diversity, and innovation from all our employees, customers, and partners.

  

"As a Customer Obsessed company, we must first be Employee Obsessed. We need to make sure that we provide the team with the tools and resources they need to go All\-In." Oren Kaniel, CEO

title: Lead GTM Engineer
description:
**Job Description**
-------------------


We're hiring a **Lead GTM Engineer** to **run** our multi\-channel outbound motion—**hands\-on in the stack.**


### **Summary**


* **Flexible Title:** Can tailor to reflect your skills \& experience.
* **Flexible Time:** Can do full\-time, part\-time, side\-gig (off\-hours), or fractional (contract).
* **Flexible Commitment:** Can do short\-term, long\-term, or intermittent.


**Why so flexible?** We're a FUNDED startup racing to launch end of Q2 2026\. That gives us just 3 months to stack features while raising additional working capital. Feel free to jump in, help us ship, then bounce \>\> or stick around. A successful launch translates into lots of permanent jobs for those that want them. We're also interested in long\-term "side gig" relationships, if that's what you're into—in our experience, a few expert hours often beat full\-time learning\-curve hours.


### **About Us**


We're a credible, funded, remote\-first startup led by a serial technical founder, backed by a 20\-person team. The product is live in private alpha. Learn more at **list\-lab.org**.


### **About The Role**


We have a **large, multi\-industry audience**, **proven channels**, and a **defined strategy**—this phase is **execution, automation, and scale**. We're hiring someone to **run the engine**.


You **own** outbound across **email, social, and community** as **one scalable system**. **AI is core**—automation, messaging, optimization. You **build, launch, and iterate** in the tools; you own execution decisions and how performance improves.


**Architect\-level support** is available if you need it—you're **trusted to lead**, move fast, and not wait on every spec. **High execution, high ownership**, with room to grow into **broader leadership**. If you want **end\-to\-end outcomes** and to show **executional and strategic** range—**this is it**.


**You'll answer:** *How do we technically execute this funnel? How do we automate, track, and scale it? How do we connect data, tools, and workflows into one system that actually runs?*


**Possible Tech Stack:** Apollo, Clay, Smartlead, Instantly, Lemlist, PhantomBuster, Dripify, Drippi.ai, Warmy.io, GoHighLevel, SendGrid, Zapier, Make, n8n, HubSpot (or Pipedrive), and AI tools for personalization and automation. You won't just use our stack—you'll help define what the "best" options are for our use case.


### **Compensation**


Up to **$275,000** max total annual compensation in Tier 1 cities; cash and equity components to be negotiated (amount reflects combined cash and equity components).


### **What Success Looks Like in 30 Days**


* Multi\-channel pipeline live — email, LinkedIn, plus one other (Facebook, social DMs, or community)
* Stack connected: CRM, outreach tools, enrichment, analytics in a unified workflow
* Domain health and deliverability under control; sequences running with reporting on opens, replies, meetings booked
* Dashboards in place; early experiments producing data


### **What Success Looks Like in 60 Days**


* Playbooks executed and documented; others can run the systems
* Bottlenecks identified and addressed; iterating fast on data
* At least one channel producing qualified leads with clear handoff


### **What You'll Do**


* **Build and connect the stack** — CRM, outreach, enrichment, automation (see **Possible Tech Stack** above); move leads from first touch to qualified handoff
* **Implement tracking** — UTMs, attribution, pipelines, dashboards; measure by channel, spot bottlenecks
* **Own deliverability** — domain warmup, email infrastructure, list hygiene, sequence iteration
* **Run LinkedIn, Facebook, and X automation** — configure tools, avoid platform violations, vary copy and cadence with AI
* **Run experiments and document playbooks** — A/B sequences and landing pages; iterate on data; surface what works and what's breaking


### **What We're Looking For**


**Must\-haves:**


* **Hands\-on execution** — you build and run; not strategy\-only or deck\-only
* **Technical proficiency** with the GTM stack — you've shipped with these or similar tools
* **Multi\-channel outbound experience** — email, LinkedIn, or social DMs at scale
* **Pipeline thinking** — you see the whole flow and connect the pieces
* **Proven AI expertise in outbound** — production track record applying AI to personalization, automation, agents, or copy at scale. **Baseline for the role:** you're expected to operate this way from day one—not learn it on the job.
* **Fast iteration** — hypothesis experiment data decision, in days not weeks


**Nice\-to\-have:**


* Appetite to **own more of the motion over time** and ship without a spec for every move (not required day one)
* Experience collaborating with GTM operators, SDRs, or vendors
* Venture\-backed startup experience


### **What You're NOT**


* **Not a delegator** — day one you're doing the work yourself; you may add support over time, but this isn't a management role. If you'd rather delegate than build, this isn't the right fit.

title: GTM Engineer - DockMaster
description:
**GTM Engineer \- GTM Engineer \- DockMaster**

**About Dockmaster.com**

Dockmaster.com is the leading marina management platform serving entertainment attractions and venues across the waterfront industry. Our software powers dock operations, reservations, billing, and guest experiences for marinas nationwide.


We’re building a modern revenue engine to match our ambitions — and this role is at the center of that transformation.


The GTM Engineer is a hybrid builder–operator who designs and maintains the technical infrastructure that powers Dockmaster’s revenue engine. Rather than manually running sales and marketing operations, you’ll build systems that automate, scale, and optimize them. You’ll sit at the intersection of engineering, data, and go\-to\-market strategy — turning workflows that take hours into systems that run in seconds. In short: you don’t just run the playbook — you build the machine that runs it.


Working cross\-functionally with Sales, Marketing, Product, and Professional Services. You’ll be embedded within the revenue team but operate with significant autonomy — think of yourself as the engineering arm of the go\-to\-market organization.


Collaborates With Sales (SDRs, AEs), Marketing, Product, Data, Professional Services, Product Manager, Sales, Marketing Lead.


**Why Dockmaster**

* Ground\-floor opportunity to build the entire GTM technical infrastructure from scratch
* Direct impact on revenue — your systems will power every dollar of new business
* Work alongside a leadership team that values speed, experimentation, and automation\-first thinking
* Category\-defining SaaS platform in a vertical with massive, untapped potential
* Autonomy to choose your tools, design your systems, and own the outcomes

**The successful candidate will be based anywhere in the US, working in a remote work model!**

**What your day will look like****:**

**Sales Automation and Productivity**

* Build and maintain tools that dramatically increase SDR and AE productivity across the full sales cycle
* Design automated lead enrichment pipelines that append firmographic, technographic, and intent data to inbound and outbound leads in real time
* Build prospecting automation workflows that surface high\-fit accounts based on ICP criteria and buying signals
* Architect CRM workflow automations in HubSpot to enforce pipeline hygiene, automate stage progression, and trigger internal notifications
* Develop AI\-driven outbound messaging sequences that personalize at scale using prospect\-specific context
* Create meeting booking automation to reduce scheduling friction and increase connect rates

**Growth, Infrastructure and Pipeline Generation**

* Create the systems that generate and nurture a pipeline without constant manual intervention
* Build automated outbound campaign engines that execute multi\-channel sequences (email, LinkedIn, phone) on a defined cadence
* Develop AI\-generated personalized outreach at scale, adapting messaging to prospective industry, role, and stage
* Implement data scraping and lead sourcing workflows to build targeted prospect lists from public data sources
* Create trigger\-based prospecting systems (e.g., a marina raises funding or announces expansion AI detects personalized outreach generated SDR notified)
* Support product\-led growth workflows that convert trial users into qualified pipeline

**AI\-Powered GTM Leverage**

* AI across the revenue stack to give Dockmaster an outsized competitive advantage in speed and personalization
* Build and manage AI SDR assistants that handle initial prospect engagement, qualification, and handoff
* Develop AI\-generated demo environments and personalized demo prep packets
* Create AI proposal and SOW generation tools that reduce deal cycle time
* Implement AI call summary and coaching workflows that feed insights back into the sales process
* Build AI\-based prospective research tools that deliver actionable account briefs before every call

**Data and Revenue Analytics**

* Build the dashboards and models that give leadership real\-time visibility into revenue performance
* Design pipeline analytics dashboards that track stage velocity, conversion rates, and bottlenecks
* Build and refine lead scoring models that prioritize the highest\-value opportunities for sales
* Implement end\-to\-end conversion tracking across marketing and sales touchpoints
* Create experimentation analysis frameworks to measure the impact of GTM tests
* Develop attribution systems that connect marketing spending to closed revenue

**Experimentation and Rapid Growth Testing**


* Run a high\-velocity experimentation program that continuously improves GTM performance
* Target: 10–20 experiments per month
* Test different ICP segments to identify under\-penetrated verticals within the marina and entertainment industry
* A/B test outreach messaging across channels, personas, and value propositions
* Run pricing and packaging experiments in collaboration with product and finance
* Optimize the demo POC close conversion funnel with structured tests and measurement
* Document findings in a shared experiment log to build institutional knowledge

**Tech Stack and Tools:**

**You’ll be expected to work fluently across the following (or equivalent) tools:**

* Category Tools CRM and Sales Engagement HubSpot (primary), Salesforce familiarity a plus
* Enrichment and Prospecting ZoomInfo
* AI and LLMs OpenAI APIs, Claude, custom AI workflows
* Data and Analytics SQL, Looker / Metabase / HubSpot reporting, Google Sheets
* Outreach and Sequencing HubSpot Sequences, Outreach, or equivalent
* Dev and Scripting Python, JavaScript/Node.js, REST APIs

**About You****:**

* 3\+ years of experience in revenue operations, sales engineering, growth engineering, or a technical GTM role
* Hands\-on proficiency building automations in CRM platforms (HubSpot strongly preferred)
* Working knowledge of APIs, webhooks, and integration platforms (Zapier, Make, or custom code)
* Experience implementing AI/LLM\-powered workflows in a business context
* Strong analytical skills with the ability to build dashboards and interpret pipeline data
* Bias toward action: you ship fast, measure results, and iterate
* Excellent cross\-functional communication — able to translate between sales, marketing, and engineering
* Experience in B2B SaaS, ideally selling into niche or vertical markets
* Background in the marina, attractions, hospitality, or venue management space
* Proficiency in Python or JavaScript for building custom tools and scripts
* Familiarity with Clay, Apollo, or similar enrichment and prospecting platforms
* Track record of running structured growth experiments with measurable outcomes
* Fluent in English, both written and verbal, is essential
* Legally authorized to work in the US


For information about **DockMaster**, please visit our website at www.dockmaster.com

**We thank all applicants for their interest; however, only those candidates selected for an interview will be contacted.**

**\#Dockmaster**

title: Senior Manager, Go-To-Market Engineering
description:
**New York Office****Engineering – 13001 \- Engineering /****Permanent Full Time Employee /****Hybrid**





Aircall is a unicorn, AI\-powered customer communications platform used by 22,000\+ companies worldwide to drive revenue, resolve issues faster, and scale customer\-facing teams. We’re redefining customer communications by bringing voice, SMS, WhatsApp, and AI together into one seamless workspace.  

Our momentum comes from a simple idea: help teams work smarter, not harder. Aircall’s AI Voice Agent automates routine calls, AI Assist streamlines post\-call work, and AI Assist Pro delivers real\-time guidance so people can do their best work. The result is higher revenue, faster resolutions, and teams that scale with confidence.  

Aircall is headquartered in Paris, our European HQ, with a strong North American presence anchored in Seattle, our North American HQ, and teams across Madrid, London, Berlin, San Francisco, New York City, Sydney, and Mexico City. We’ve built a product customers love and a business that’s scaling quickly, backed by world\-class investors and driven by rapid AI innovation across multiple product lines.
At Aircall, you’ll join a company in motion. We’re ambitious, product\-driven, and execution\-focused, with visible impact, fast decisions, and real growth. **How we work at Aircall:** We’re customer\-obsessed, data\-driven, and focused on delivering meaningful outcomes. We value ownership, continuous learning, and thoughtful speed. If you thrive in a collaborative, fast\-moving environment where trust and impact matter, you’ll feel at home here.  

We are seeking an experienced Senior Manager to lead the Go\-to\-Market (GTM) Engineering team and drive business transformation. In this role, you will work cross\-functionally with key stakeholders across Sales, Marketing, Customer Success, and Revenue Operations to design and implement scalable solutions that enhance operational efficiency and support revenue growth.
  

As the Senior Manager of the team, you will provide thought leadership, influence business strategies, and leverage your expertise in business process automation, system integrations, and data analytics to solve complex challenges. This is an opportunity to shape the future of our GTM technology landscape by leveraging your management skills and understanding of CRM and analytics tools.### **Key Responsibilities:**

* Act as a trusted advisor to executive leadership, collaborate with the team’s Principal Business Systems Engineer to evangelize your vision of a north\-star GTMS architecture and provide strategic insights and recommendations to optimize GTM processes and systems.
* Lead complex, cross\-functional initiatives to enhance business capabilities across the entire customer lifecycle from lead generation to revenue recognition.
* Define and implement best practices for business process automation, system integrations, and data governance.
* Collaborate closely with Sales, Marketing, Partnerships and Customer Success teams to identify opportunities for operational efficiencies and revenue growth.
* Translate high\-level business objectives into actionable roadmaps, partnering with technical teams to implement scalable solutions.
* Evaluate Buy Vs Build options with an inclination to build in\-house tooling when technically advantageous and cost\-effective in the long run.
* Drive the adoption of low\-code/no\-code solutions (Salesforce Flows, Hubspot Workflows, Zapier, N8N, etc.) to enhance productivity and streamline operations.
* Oversee the design and execution of Salesforce and CPQ configurations, Hubspot configurations, reporting frameworks, and data enrichment strategies.
* Evaluate new technologies and trends, providing recommendations to enhance the GTM tech stack.
* Develop and present business cases for investments in technology and process improvements.
* Mentor and coach your team, fostering a culture of continuous learning and excellence.
### **Qualifications:**

* 6\+ years of experience in a Business Systems role with GTM focus, preferably in a SaaS or high\-growth environment.
* 4\+ years of experience being people manager of a team of business systems engineers and/or full stack software engineers.
* Expertise in Salesforce CRM, CPQ solutions, and Hubspot CRM .
* Strong technical knowledge of system integrations, API\-driven workflows, and low\-code automation tools in the GTM space.
* Development experience with Salesforce (APEX), HubSpot (Workflows with Python/JS), declarative automation, and workflow configuration.
* Deep understanding of business processes across Sales, Marketing, and Customer Success.
* Demonstrated ability to lead enterprise\-wide projects with a focus on process optimization and efficiency.
* Proven track record in business process re\-engineering and cross\-functional stakeholder management.
* Strong analytical skills, with experience in creating data\-driven reports and dashboards to support business decision\-making.
* Excellent communication and leadership skills, with the ability to influence stakeholders at all levels of the organization.
* Experience working in Agile environments and applying project management methodologies such as Scrum or Kanban.
### **Preferred Skills:**

* Experience with business process modeling, data analysis, and translating complex business needs into technical solutions.
* Salesforce developer/administrator certifications and Hubspot certifications.
* Familiarity with the broader GTM tech stack including sales engagement tools (Optreach, ZoomInfo, Lusha) and marketing automation tools.
* Strong analytical skills and familiarity with reporting tools such as Tableau, Power BI, Looker, Hex and SQL skills.
* Understanding of revenue operations strategies and their impact on business growth.

Experience with change management frameworks to support business transformation initiatives.  
* 
### **Tools \& Technologies You'll Work With:**

* Salesforce (CRM, Apex, CPQ), HubspotMarketo, Impartner, Chili Piper.
* Low\-code platforms for business automation and optimization.
* System integrations and API workflows to connect key business platforms.
* Reporting and analytics tools for data visualization and insights.
$190,000 \- $245,000 a year
This is not including equity and other benefits. The actual salary offered will carefully consider a wide range of factors, including your skills, qualifications, and experience.**Why join us?**  

 Key moment to join Aircall in terms of growth and opportunities* ️ Our people matter, work\-life balance is important at Aircall


 Fast\-learning environment, entrepreneurial and strong team spirit
 45\+ Nationalities: cosmopolite \& multi\-cultural mindset

 Medical, dental, and vision insurance is 100% covered
 401k plan with company matching!
✈️ Unlimited PTO — take the time you need to come to work feeling great!* ️ Wellness, commuter, and childcare reimbursements


 Generous parental leave policy

title: GTM Engineer
description:
**Zyphra** **is an artificial intelligence company based in San Francisco, California.**
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**The Role:**
-------------


As a **GTM Engineer**, you will be a core builder on Zyphra's GTM team, responsible for designing, deploying, and continuously improving the AI\-driven systems that power our go\-to\-market engine. This is not a traditional sales, sales ops or RevOps role. You will bring direct GTM domain expertise and deep, hands\-on proficiency with modern AI tools and you'll use both to build infrastructure that creates lasting commercial leverage.


The best candidates for this role have done the hard work of GTM: outbound strategy, customer segmentation, messaging, business development and have also built tangible applications with AI tools. You know where the manual work hides, and you know how to engineer it away.

**You’ll Work Across:**
-----------------------

* Designing and deploying end\-to\-end AI\-powered GTM workflows spanning prospecting, outreach, enrichment, qualification, and pipeline management
* Building and owning the GTM tech stack with tools like Clay, n8n, HubSpot, and custom integrations, and architecting the systems that connect them
* Developing and iterating customer segmentation models, ICP scoring frameworks, and signal\-based targeting systems using enrichment data and AI
* Rapid\-prototyping new GTM motions, running structured experiments with real pipeline data, and scaling what works
* Using Claude Code, Cursor, and other AI coding tools to build custom automations, scripts, and lightweight applications that accelerate GTM output
* Partnering with sales, marketing, and business development to translate business needs into automated systems and measuring the revenue impact
* Identifying new areas where AI tools can be applied to GTM functions, staying ahead of what's possible and experimenting before it becomes standard practice
* Developing communications processes, messaging frameworks, outreach sequences, and content systems that can be personalized at scale through AI

**What We're Looking For / Requirements:**
------------------------------------------

* 3–5 years of hands\-on experience in B2B go\-to\-market roles: business development, sales operations, growth, or revenue operations, with direct exposure to customer segmentation, targeting, outbound strategy, and pipeline generation
* Deep, working proficiency with AI coding tools including Claude Code and Cursor/Copilot, you build with these tools daily, not occasionally
* Experience building and automating workflows with tools like n8n, Zapier, Make, or similar platforms, with the ability to design and deploy complex multi\-step automations
* Hands\-on experience with Clay, Apollo, or equivalent data enrichment and prospecting platforms as a core part of your GTM toolset
* A systems thinker who designs for scale, you see manual GTM work as an engineering problem and default to automating it
* Excellent communication and collaboration skills; the ability to work across sales, marketing, product, and research teams to understand needs and ship solutions
* Demonstrated ability to operate in fast\-moving, ambiguous environments where the playbook doesn't exist yet

**Qualifications / Additional Skills:**
---------------------------------------

* Experience with CRM platforms (HubSpot, Salesforce) including building custom workflows, lifecycle stages, and reporting infrastructure
* Comfort writing Python or SQL to build custom integrations, data pipelines, or lightweight internal tools when off\-the\-shelf solutions aren't enough
* Familiarity with LLM prompting techniques and orchestration frameworks as applied to GTM use cases: process optimization, outreach personalization, research automation, scoring, summarization
* Experience measuring and reporting on GTM automation ROI: pipeline generated, time saved, conversion improvements, CAC reduction
* Comfort designing and testing messaging frameworks at the ICP, vertical, or persona level and using AI to personalize at scale
* Prior experience at an early\-stage or high\-growth AI company, or strong familiarity with the AI tooling ecosystem
* Interest in frontier AI research and the ability to translate technical product concepts into compelling commercial narratives

**Why Work at Zyphra:**
-----------------------

* Zyphra is building at the frontier of AI and this role sits at the center of how that work gets seen
* You will build and help define the function, not inherit it; there is no legacy playbook to maintain
* We move with the urgency of a startup and the rigor of a research lab, speed and quality are not in tension here, they're expected together
* You will work directly alongside researchers, engineers, and founders, not through layers of management, which means your work gets seen, challenged, and improved fast
* We believe GTM can be a demonstration of what AI can do; you will be empowered to prove that

**Benefits and Perks:**
-----------------------

* Comprehensive medical, dental, vision, and FSA plans
* Competitive compensation and 401(k) plan
* Relocation and immigration support on a case\-by\-case basis
* In\-office snacks and meals provided
* Unlimited PTO and company holidays
* In\-person team in San Francisco with a collaborative, high\-energy environment

title: Growth Engineer
description:
**Why Socure?**
---------------


Socure is building the identity trust infrastructure for the digital economy — verifying 100% of good identities in real time and stopping fraud before it starts. The mission is big, the problems are complex, and the impact is felt by businesses, governments, and millions of people every day.


We hire people who want that level of responsibility. People who move fast, think critically, act like owners, and care deeply about solving customer problems with precision. If you want predictability or narrow scope, this won’t be your place. If you want to help build the future of identity with a team that holds a high bar for itself — keep reading.

**About the role**
------------------


Socure is on the search for a Growth Engineer—an entrepreneurial technologist who thrives at the intersection of product, engineering, marketing, and go\-to\-market. In this high\-impact role, you’ll architect and execute growth systems that amplify our brand, generate personalized pipeline, and unlock customer acquisition across multiple verticals with tailored, data\-driven messaging.


You’re part builder and part creative strategist—with a deep curiosity and a relentless bias toward experimentation. Whether you're launching full\-stack campaigns, optimizing outbound with precision personalization, you'll operate like a growth lab: fast cycles, tight feedback loops, and measurable impact. If you're excited to blend code, content, and conversion tactics to move markets and revenue, this is your moment. You won’t just support growth—you’ll engineer it.

**What you'll do**
------------------

**This role is for a builder who prototypes and ships faster than most teams can spec a brief.**

* Scale our sales and marketing functions through automation, AI assistance, and accessible insights
* Own campaign automation with logic for lifecycle drips, and new GTM workflows.
* Automate prospecting with creative, never\-seen\-before outreach tactics
* Build viral tools, shareable demos, and mini\-products that drive organic traffic and referrals across industries like fintech, government, and eCommerce.
* Act as an internal multiplier, sharing tools, playbooks, and internal agents that help marketing and GTM teams move faster.
* Craft compelling copy and UI elements that effectively communicate our value proposition. Launch interactive landing pages, calculators, or integrations that showcase our AI/ML identity graph and verification capabilities.
* Partner in automating meaningful customer communications through community slack channels, as well as Substack and LinkedIn communities
* Create AI agents that automate flows from product design to go\-to\-market, capturing the minds and hearts of new customers and driving cross\-sell within existing ones.
* Change the game in competitive positioning by designing agents that continuously monitor the market, scraping for negative sentiment and/or market shifts that can be leveraged to out\-position the competition.
* Play an integral role in building self\-service product initiatives with elegant, UX and dynamic messaging to capture new and existing customers
* Automate prospecting workflows using innovative tools like clay.io, GenAI agents, and web scrapers to scale outbound marketing.
* Analyze funnel and behavioral data to rapidly pivot strategies where needed. Change the way RevOps and Marketing Ops measure success.
* Partner cross\-functionally with marketing, partnerships, and product to ensure experiments are aligned to commercial goals.
* Experiment rapidly. You’ll design and run A/B tests, measure impact, and iterate quickly on ideas that drive user adoption and revenue.
* Stay on the bleeding edge. You’ll continuously research new tools, platforms, and frameworks for growth, testing what’s possible and bringing the best solutions in\-house

**What You Bring**
------------------

**Technical Proficiency**

* Experience with growth tools like Clay, Apollo, Clearbit, Instantly, or Hypergrowth, including multi\-step outbound and enrichment flows.
* Full\-stack development skills (e.g., JavaScript, Python, React) to build growth experiments and internal tools.  

Skilled in using AI copilots and agents to personalize messaging, automate outreach, and surface insights from CRM data.
* Comfortable working with APIs, webhooks, and automation platforms (Zapier, Retool, Make, etc.) to connect and scale GTM systems.
* Working knowledge of SQL and audience segmentation for performance measurement and optimization.

 **AI\-Driven Growth**

* Hands\-on experience building or integrating AI agents to accelerate campaign creation, onboarding, and user research.
* Ability to generate dynamic, cross\-vertical messaging at scale, personalized by industry, use case, or persona.  

Familiar with LLM tools (ChatGPT, Claude, custom embeddings) to create content and power conversion workflows.

 **Growth Strategy**

* Track record of designing and shipping growth experiments across acquisition, onboarding, and retention.
* Confident optimizing funnels, running A/B tests, and driving data\-led iteration cycles.
* Deep understanding of demand gen, brand storytelling, and GTM personalization across verticals.

title: Marketing Automation Engineer
description:
**POSITION:** **Marketing Automation Engineer**

**LOCATION:** New York, NY

**HOURS:** Full\-Time, non\-union. 40hrs/week

**COMPENSATION:** $110k \- $125k (Commensurate with Experience)

**ABOUT THE POSITION**


As a Marketing Automation Engineer within our CRM and Data team, you will bridge marketing technology and data engineering to enhance how we automate, personalize, and measure customer engagement. You’ll work across our key platforms — including Iterable, Snowflake, and Power BI — to design reliable data pipelines, integrate APIs, and build scalable solutions that power dynamic marketing campaigns.




You’ll collaborate with marketing professionals, data scientists, analysts, and CRM specialists to operationalize recommendations, testing frameworks, and campaign logic within our marketing ecosystem. This role is ideal for someone who thrives at the intersection of marketing and engineering — experienced in marketing platforms and data infrastructure, curious about data science, and excited to build systems that turn insights into action at scale.

**PEOPLE, PLACES, AND THINGS**

* Partner with CRM, Data, and Marketing teams to shape how we use data and technology to deliver smarter, more personalized marketing.
* Build and maintain the systems and workflows that connect our key platforms — including Iterable, Snowflake, Power BI, and other web services — ensuring data flows reliably and supports campaign delivery at scale.
* Build and deploy automations / journeys that complement the customer lifecycle, increase engagement, and build customer loyalty.
* Identify automation opportunities to improve marketing efficiency.
* Ensure our marketing systems are robust and well\-documented, establishing best practices for testing, monitoring, and process improvement.
* Collaborate with analysts and data scientists to turn insights and models into practical applications that drive campaign performance and personalisation.
* Proactively identify opportunities to enhance data quality, streamline workflows, and improve how teams across the business use technology to reach customers.

**EXPERIENCE AND SKILLS**

**Essential**

* Experience with campaign automation, audience segmentation, or personalization using API\-driven data workflows.
* Proven experience building, maintaining, and optimizing API\-based integrations between data warehouses, marketing platforms, and cloud services.
* Hands\-on experience working with Customer Engagement Platforms (e.g. Iterable or similar platforms), including data ingestion, event tracking, and campaign automation via API.
* Experience working with Data Science teams to operationalize models, delivering their outputs into marketing and upstream systems such as Iterable or Snowflake.
* Experience designing and maintaining data pipelines across modern data stacks — e.g. Snowflake, dbt, and AWS (S3, Lambda, Glue).
* Strong proficiency in Python and SQL for data transformation, automation, and API integration.
* Strong communication and collaboration skills, working confidently with both technical and non\-technical stakeholders.
* Ability to translate marketing and business requirements into reliable, scalable, and well\-documented technical solutions.
* Knowledge of data governance and privacy regulations (GDPR, CAN\-SPAM, CCPA).

**Desirable**

* Good understanding of data orchestration, version control, and testing practices (e.g. Airflow, GitHub, CI/CD).
* Exposure to data visualization and reporting tools (Power BI, Tableau, or Looker).
* Proven record of maximizing value from consumer data, especially within the media/live entertainment domain.

**BENEFITS**

* Medical, Dental and Vision Insurance
* 401k Match
* Paid Vacation \& Holidays

**ATG Entertainment: Passion Behind Performance**

**ATG Entertainment is a world leader in live entertainment.** Our portfolio of venues includes historic theatres, studio theatres, cinemas, conference spaces, and modern live music arenas. ATG Entertainment own, operate or program 73 of the world’s most iconic venues across the UK, the US and Continental Europe entertaining over 18 million audience members each year.


Through our in\-house Production companies and working closely with top producers and promoters ATG presents over 15,000 live performances annually, including ***Cabaret at the Kit Kat Club***, ***Stranger Things: The First Shadow***, ***Moulin Rouge***, ***The Lion King***, ***Harry Potter and the Cursed Child*** and ***Starlight Express*** as well as popular music and comedy shows.




**ATG** also owns a leading ticketing platform processing more than 18 million tickets each year for musicals, plays, concerts, comedy shows and a variety of other live events. ATGtickets.com attracts more than 40 million unique visitors annually. Headquartered in London and Woking, the company also has offices in New York and Cologne.


It is the passion of our teams, that cover every discipline across the live entertainment industry, that underpins our continuing strategic growth and success. Learn more about ATG Entertainment, visit **www.atgentertainment.com/**

**ATG Entertainment’s Inclusion, Diversity, Equity, \& Access Mission Statement**

**A Stage for Everyone**


Our stages are a platform for compelling stories – stories that are for all, by all, and of all. We shine our spotlight on our differences and believe that understanding and celebrating these differences makes us better global citizens. We are committed to strengthening the sense of belonging by ensuring diversity and equity in everything we do. We strive to make our venues beacons of these ideals in our communities. On stage and off, we hold ourselves accountable for nurturing an inclusive culture, one in which everyone can bring their authentic selves, and everyone feels they belong.




**At ATG Entertainment, we provide a stage for everyone.**

title: GTM Engineer
description:
Akeneo is the Product Experience (PX) company and global leader in Product Information Management (PIM), creating a world where every product interaction is an experience that guides consumers and professionals to the best purchase, anytime, anywhere.


We're all about experience \- from the best\-in\-class product we build to the inspiring environment we create for our employees. You'll grow in a dynamic environment where your ideas and expertise will make an impact from day one. Our flexible work model empowers you to thrive, balancing professional success with personal fulfillment. At Akeneo, you’ll be part of a supportive and collaborative team that values open communication, shared successes, and meaningful relationships.


Learn more about our culture and values via our Career page.


As our first GTM Engineer, you will treat the sales funnel as a technical product. You are the architect of growth experiments and the primary bridge between market intent and revenue execution.


Your goal is to eliminate manual prospecting and increase conversion rates.

### **Job description**

* Design and own the automated workflows that ingest raw signals—like tech\-stack changes or website behavior—and transform them into ready\-to\-act leads for Sales.
* Support the integration of LLMs to automate deep\-dive account research and generate hyper\-personalized outreach at a scale that maintains human\-level relevance.
* Build the "connective tissue" across the revenue stack using Python, SQL, and REST APIs, ensuring seamless data orchestration between tools like Salesforce and Slack.
* Drive the technical setup and A/B testing for new growth hypotheses, moving from idea to live, instrumented campaigns in days by bypassing traditional dev backlogs.
* Develop scalable flows in Clay, Cargo, or n8n to sanitize unstructured data and validate new third\-party intent sources (e.g., technographics or hiring trends).
* Directly reclaim GTM time by automating "data stitching" and delivering auto\-generated "Account Cheat Sheets" directly into the CRM or Slack.
* Act as the agile executor for the experimental layer of the GTM stack, packaging and documenting successful technical plays for global adoption by the broader RevTech team.

### **What we look for**

* 2–4 years of experience in Revenue Operation, Sales Operations, Growth Engineering, Forward Deployed Engineer.
* Proficiency in Python and SQL — you will write code as needed.
* Strong understanding of API logic and connectivity.
* Working knowledge of Salesforce
* Experience with at least one modern GTM enrichment/orchestration platform (Clay, Cargo, Clearbit, Apollo, ZoomInfo, or similar).
* Demonstrated ability to take a workflow from idea to production — scoping, building, testing, documenting, and iterating.
* Comfort working with data at scale: cleaning, transforming, enriching, and routing contact/account records.


You don't need to tick every box. We strongly encourage candidates from all backgrounds to apply. If you are excited about this opportunity but your experience is slightly different, we still want to hear from you!

### **Interview process**

* 30\-minute screening call with a member of our Talent Acquisition team
* 60\-minute Hiring manager interview
* 60\-minute Technical interview

### **Life at Akeneo**

##### **Work Environment**

* **Work\-Life Balance:** Enjoy 25 days of annual leave with flexible working hours, and a hybrid setup allowing 3\-4 days working from home. Option to Work from Anywhere for up to 30 days per year.
* **Home Office \& Commuting Allowance:** Enjoy a $600 budget to enhance your home office and an $80 monthly sustainable transportation allowance for eco\-friendly commuting.

##### **Inclusivity**

* **Generous Parental Leave:** Benefit from 16 weeks of paid maternity leave, 4 weeks of paid leave for the second parent. A gradual return to work program is also available.
* **Community \& Support:** Engage in 2 paid volunteering days annually and join Employee Resource Groups dedicated to promoting diversity and inclusion within the company.

##### **Growth and Development**

* **Professional Development:** Access a $1,000 annual budget for personal professional development and take advantage of career paths, internal mobility opportunities, and a "Women in Leadership Programme."
* **Comprehensive Onboarding:** Start on the right foot with an 8\-week onboarding program.

##### **Wellbeing**

* **Health \& Insurance:** Receive 100% employer contribution for employees and their dependents for medical, dental, and vision benefits up to the set caps.
* **Financial Security:** Benefit from a 401k with a 4% company match and short as well as long\-term disability insurance.
* **Mental Health Support:** Access individual and confidential sessions with a mental health practitioner or coach of your choice.


For more information about benefits, don’t hesitate to contact our Talent Acquisition team.

title: Founding Growth Marketer / GTM Engineer
description:
**About Usul**
--------------


Usul is building the “Amazon for Government”, a world where any company can sell to any government in a few clicks on their computer. Anything from national security tech, space stations, energy infrastructure, healthcare and more.


Our AI platform helps companies identify, pursue, and win the government opportunities they’re most likely to convert and makes it dramatically easier for governments to buy from the private sector.


In 1 year we’ve grown to $5M\+ ARR securing Fortune 500 government contractors, the U.S. government and NATO as customers. We’re now entering the next phase of growth to capture the entire U.S. market and expand to over 60\+ allied nations.

**About the role**
------------------


We’re build a small, elite team with high standards and low ego. We care about doing whatever it takes, getting better at the craft every week, and being genuinely fun to work with. We’re the youngest team in our world by far. We’re in our 20s running around defense conferences in Usul t\-shirts, surrounded by 40 to 60 year olds in suits and military uniforms. People see us as the ambitious AI builders bringing real Silicon Valley energy and modern technology to one of the most traditional industries on earth.


As our lead Founding GTM/Growth Marketer you will be the fuel on the fire to help scale the team to IPO globally. You'll build the systems, campaigns, and experiments that turn Usul's momentum into a growth machine.


What you will be doing:

* Own and continuously optimize Usul's landing pages, conversion flows, and outbound campaigns from strategy to execution
* Lead SEO end\-to\-end: keyword research, programmatic pages, content strategy, and on\-page optimization
* Build the dashboards, systems, and processes that let growth learnings compound over time
* Build and run lifecycle campaigns (email, onboarding, reactivation) to drive activation and retention
* Partner closely with product, design, and engineering to align growth efforts with where the product is heading
* Vibe\-code internal tools and automation to eliminate manual work and move faster

**What we're looking for:**

* 2–5 years in a growth or GTM role at an early\-stage or B2B SaaS startup
* Proven track record owning SEO, landing page optimization, email marketing, and content strategy
* Strong analytical chops: comfortable with funnels, cohorts, and conversion metrics
* Scrappy, high\-ownership operator (you don't wait to be told what to do)
* Comfortable vibe coding experiments without waiting on engineering
* Bias to action, thrives in ambiguity, and genuinely excited about national security and defense tech

### **About the interview**

* Intro Call (15 min)
* Founder Culture Call (15\-30 min) \- In Person if you are in SF!
* GTM Technical (45 mins)
* 2\-3 day Work Trial
* Offer!


Compensation Range: $120K \- $200K

title: GTM Engineer
description:
DISQO’s mission is to build the world’s most trusted ad measurement platform that fuels brand growth.
The world’s largest brands, agencies, and media companies trust DISQO for expert insight and AI\-driven intelligence about their advertising performance across all platforms. We capture people’s sentiments and journeys, connecting them with the brands they value and the media they consume. With this identity\-based approach, brands gain more accurate and authentic insight so they can create more meaningful interactions.  

Joining DISQO Nation means becoming part of a community that champions speed, innovation, and continuous growth. We invest deeply in our talent, empowering our teams to reach their highest potential. Together, we are shaping the future of work at DISQO—defined by performance, purpose, and impact.  

We show up each day with curiosity and ambition, committed to learning, accelerating growth, and making a lasting difference. Grounded in our values and principles, we lead and collaborate to elevate performance, accountability, and excellence at every level of the organization. And through it all, we make sure to have fun along the way.  

The GTM Engineer is a member of the Revenue Operations team responsible for executing on GTM AI \& workflow initiatives with the goal of scaling our outbound prospecting systems and improving the productivity of our Sales, Marketing \& Customer Success teams. We are looking for someone with a GTM (Sales \& Marketing) or operations background who understands the revenue context and can translate this into impactful automation.
### **What you get to do:**

* Build our prospecting architecture \- using our tools such as Clay, Octave, Salesforce to identify high\-intent prospects, build new signals, enrich data, and lead routing.
* Build our outbound architecture \- Align our ICP and Persona with effective messaging to assist our BDR team and other automated outbound and inbound campaigns e.g., marketing advertising segments.
* Improve the productivity of our GTM teams (Sales, Marketing \& Customer Success) by delivering easy\-to\-use agents that automate repetitive tasks, reduce bottlenecks, draft AI\-assisted playbooks to assist key goals (e.g., build pipeline, closing, renewals), and train users on being effective with AI agents.
* Create a measurable framework to pipeline generation by creating strategic automated outbound campaigns, enabling the BDR team, tracking key metrics, and optimizing based on the data.
* Develop prototypes and run pilots in order to discover what works using tools such as A/B or multivariate testing to discover what is working and implementing new approaches and scaling what works.
* Measure impact and ROI by quantifying hours saved, pipeline sourced or influenced, and conversion lifts
### **What you bring to the role:**

* 3\-5\+ years in Sales, Marketing, Operations or GTM role preferably in a B2B environment.
* Demonstrated success deploying GenAI \& workflow tools in the GTM such as lead scoring, intent signals, outbound triggers or creating AI briefs e.g., synthesizing data source information for accounts.
* You are GTM oriented meaning you understand sales and marketing processes and their impact on downstream outcomes.
* Strong data literacy and understanding of data models in GTM tools such as Salesforce, Hubspot or other SaaS tools.
* Cross\-functional operator ability to communicate with a wide\-array of stakeholders in the GTM, IT, engineering or product.
* Nimble and scrappy \- you don’t get stuck on perfection or ambiguity, but comfortable launching MVPs and iterating towards success and scaling.
* Experience working with workflow automation tools such as Clay or n8n.
* Experience creating agents such as Gemini Enterprise.
* Familiarity with GTM tools such as, but not necessarily Salesforce, Clay, Hubspot, Salesloft, Outreach, etc.
### **Nice to have:**

* Experience developing integrations such as APIs or webhooks and managing data waterfalls.
* Ability to vibe code applications with the goal of building out internal GTM apps
\#LI\-MV1  

At DISQO, we pride ourselves on having a positive, performance\-oriented workplace that includes a flexible hybrid approach, competitive medical benefits, and an amazing vacation policy. **Perks \& Benefits:*** 100% covered Medical/Dental/Vision for employee, competitive dependent coverage
* Stock options
* 401K
* Generous PTO policy
* Team offsites, social events \& happy hours
* Life Insurance
* Health FSA
* Commuter FSA (for hybrid employees)
* Catered lunch and fully stocked kitchen
* Paid Maternity/Paternity leave
* Disability Insurance
* Travel Assistance Program
* 24/7 Counseling Services offered to Employees

 ***Note: The benefits noted above are for full time US based employees only.*** **DISQO is an equal opportunity employer. Discovery, innovation, and growth are possible when we open ourselves to new possibilities, perspectives, and approaches. That’s why, at DISQO, we welcome, support, and empower individuals from diverse backgrounds. Exceptional teams are rooted in extraordinary people, each with a unique story and a compelling set of skills. DISQO does not discriminate against employees based on race, color, religion, sex, national origin, gender identity or expression, age, disability, pregnancy (including childbirth, breastfeeding, or related medical condition), genetic information, protected military or veteran status, sexual orientation, or any other characteristic protected by applicable federal, state or local laws.*** ***Recruiting firms that submit resumes to DISQO without first entering into a written contract will not be entitled to any compensation on candidates referred by that firm.***

We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

title: Marketing Automation Engineer
description:
About NCSA College Recruiting
  
NCSA College Recruiting is the world largest college recruiting platform, providing student\-athletes content, tools, coaching and access to a network of 40,000 college coaches across 37 sports. NCSA is an online experience of IMG Academy, the world’s leading sports education brand and one of the Best and Brightest Companies to Work For in the Nation in 2024 and Top Remote Places to Work in 2024\. IMG Academy provides a holistic education model that empowers student\-athletes to win their future, preparing them for college and for life. Additional on\-campus and online experiences include:
  
* Boarding school and camps, via a state\-of\-the\-art campus in Bradenton, Fla.
* Online coaching via IMG Academy\+, with a focus on personal development through the lens of sport and performance


**Position Summary:**  

We are seeking a highly technical Salesforce Marketing Cloud (SFMC) Solutions Architect to own solution design, support data architecture, and technical strategy for our marketing automation ecosystem. This role sits between marketing strategy and engineering, translating complex business requirements into scalable, secure, high\-performing SFMC solutions.
  
This individual will act as the technical authority for Marketing Cloud, providing architectural direction and hands\-on expertise, while leveraging external developers on retainer for complex or urgent build needs.
  
This role is critical to reducing technical friction, improving platform scalability, and enabling smarter, more efficient marketing execution. You’ll help move the organization from reactive builds to intentional, well\-architected solutions — while still getting things shipped.
  
  

**Position Responsibilities:**  

Solution Design \& Architecture
  
* Design scalable, secure, and performant end\-to\-end marketing solutions using Salesforce Marketing Cloud and adjacent Salesforce products.
* Create high\-level and detailed solution designs covering data models, journeys, automation, and integrations.
* Ensure solutions follow SFMC best practices and align with long\-term platform strategy.


Requirements \& Stakeholder Collaboration
  
* Partner with marketing, CRM, data, and product stakeholders to gather and translate complex business requirements into technical solutions.
* Act as a trusted technical advisor, helping teams understand trade\-offs, constraints, and opportunities within SFMC.
* Anticipate future needs and proactively propose architectural improvements.


Technical Leadership
  
* Serve as the technical lead for Marketing Cloud, setting standards, patterns, and best practices.
* Provide guidance and mentorship to internal team members on SFMC capabilities and technical concepts.
* Review and oversee work delivered by external developers to ensure quality and alignment with architecture.


Campaign \& Journey Optimization
  
* Design and optimize customer journeys, segmentation strategies, and personalization frameworks to improve performance and ROI.
* Partner with marketing strategy teams to translate campaign goals into technically sound implementations.
* Balance speed\-to\-market with long\-term maintainability.


Data, Performance \& Scalability
  
* Architect and maintain SFMC data models using Data Extensions and related tooling.
* Design integrations with Salesforce CRM, Data Cloud, and external systems (APIs, SFTP, CDPs).
* Ensure solutions are built to handle large data volumes, frequent automation, and audience growth without degradation.
* Monitor and address performance, stability, and data hygiene issues.


Technical Environment
  
* Salesforce Marketing Cloud (Journey Builder, Email Studio, Automation Studio, Contact Builder)
* Salesforce Data Cloud
* Salesforce CRM integrations
* SQL, AMPscript
* APIs, data feeds, and automation frameworks


**Knowledge, Skills and Abilities:**  

* Deep expertise in Salesforce Marketing Cloud architecture and implementation.
* Strong technical proficiency in SQL and AMPscript.
* Hands\-on experience designing journeys, automations, and complex data models.
* Experience integrating SFMC with Salesforce CRM and external systems.
* Ability to balance strategic architecture with pragmatic execution.
* Excellent communication skills — able to explain technical concepts to non\-technical stakeholders.


**Preferred Skills:**  

* Experience with Salesforce Data Cloud or other CDPs.
* Experience operating in environments with external development partners or agencies.
* Familiarity with enterprise\-scale marketing operations and governance.
* Salesforce Certified Marketing Cloud Engagement Administrator
* Salesforce Certified Marketing Cloud Email Specialist
* Salesforce Certified Marketing Cloud Engagement Developer


**Background Requirements:**  

* Requires a background check upon offer


**Benefits:**  

As a full\-time member of our team, you will enjoy a comprehensive offering listed below. Connect with your talent acquisition specialist to learn more about benefits for our part\-time roles.
  
* Comprehensive Medical, Dental and Vision
* Flexible Spending Account and Health Savings Account options
* 401k with an Employer Match
* Short Term and Long Term Disability
* Group and Supplemental Life \& AD\&D
* Gym Discount Program
* Pet Insurance
* Wellbeing Program
* and more!


Don’t meet every single requirement? We are dedicated to building a diverse, inclusive, authentic workplace, so if you’re excited about this role but your past experience doesn’t align perfectly with every qualification in the job description, we encourage you to apply anyway. You may be just the right candidate for this or other roles.
  
  

**Get to know us better:**  

www.ncsasports.org
  
www.ncsasports.org/careers
  
  

NCSA provides equal employment opportunities to all employees and applicants for employment and prohibits discrimination and harassment of any type without regard to race, color, religion, age, sex, national origin, disability status, genetics, protected veteran status, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, or any other characteristic protected by federal, state or local laws.
